name: BLEnergy
message: BLEnergy (https://il.linkedin.com/company/blenergy-bess-integrator), a member of the Blilious Group, is a leading company in planning, supply, construction, and operation of Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) for a variety of needs. Advanced energy storage systems by BLEnergy consist of CATL Energy Storage product technology. CATL is the leading battery manufacturer in the world in the fields of…
